CustomField.description: Denotes if a cluster has been decommissioned (e.g., end of POC) or an 'sdreset' was performed that changed the cluster ID. This allows us to track historical data.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Denotes if a cluster has been decommissioned (e.g., end of POC) or an 'sdreset' was performed that changed the cluster ID. This allows us to track historical data.
CustomField.label: Archived
